title: Throne of Trials
description:
◆ The same strategy will never work twice.

Adapt your strategy for every enemy,
rebuild your party,
read the opponent's actions,
and discover your path to victory.

This is a turn-based boss-conquest RPG designed entirely around the thrill of solving the boss puzzle.

Combine 15 distinct characters, a wealth of equipment, and skills to forge your own unique build.

Even defeat leads to your next breakthrough in this challenging, trial-and-error boss rush.

■ Build the Perfect Party for Each Boss

Every boss possesses completely different traits.

For one foe, focus heavily on tanks and Hate management.

For another, specialize in accuracy and Break power.

For yet another, bring raw, burst damage to melt their health bar.

The exact same party composition will not save you.

Assemble a squad of 4 from 15 distinct characters,

and freely combine:
5 active skills,
4 passive skills,
a reactive Counter-Skill,
and equipment.

Tailor your strategy to conquer each specific threat.

Convenient Quality-of-Life tools, such as one-click auto-equipping and party presets, are also fully integrated to keep your focus entirely on the strategy.

■ Read the Enemy and Seize the Initiative

Victory is not decided by stats alone.

Direct incoming attacks to your sturdiest tanks with Hate management.

Shatter Break Gauges to shut down devastating ultimate spells.

And the game’s signature mechanic—

Predicting enemy intent to trigger "Intercept Orders."

Forecast what the boss is about to do. If your prediction is correct, you act before they do.

Not only do you gain massive bonuses like critical hits and extra damage, but you can also use your speed to break and cancel their most dangerous actions entirely.

Reading the enemy becomes your ultimate weapon.

■ Every New Drop Births a New Strategy

Defeating bosses rewards you with randomly-affixed gear and powerful passive skills.

These new spoils are far more than minor stat bumps.
Specializing in critical hits.
Specializing in high damage at low HP.
Specializing in reactive counters.

As your equipment changes, your entire tactical approach changes.

Dismantle unwanted gear into Ether to upgrade your base stats or craft specialized armaments.

■ Every Boss Attacks with Unique Rules

A boss that manipulates battlefield weather.
A boss that records your damage output and strikes back with a mirror copy.
Twin bosses that demand perfect HP balance.
A boss whose actions shift depending on the tilt of a cosmic scale.

A strategy that worked once is never guaranteed to work again.

Analyze the traits of each foe, adjust your build, and find your path through persistent trial and error.

■ The Ultimate Endgame Awaits

Late in the game, the ultimate challenge—"The Trial of Oracles"—awaits to put your entire tactical knowledge to the test.

Across 10 escalating difficulty levels, the bosses assault you with previous bosses' attacks and a barrage of complex gimmicks.

Every build you have nurtured, every gear piece you have gathered, and every ounce of strategic experience you have accumulated will be put to the test.

Even in defeat, you are rewarded based on how much HP you managed to shave off the boss.

Gather your gear, refine your strategy, and dive back in.
description_short: No single strategy wins every battle. Adapt your party to each enemy, read their moves, and overcome powerful bosses. Build unique parties from 15 distinct characters and countless equipment combinations. Interrupt devastating enemy attacks and forge new strategies with every piece of loot.
